summary: FINAL implementation plan for World Bible upgrade. Includes: (1) Complete audit of current code identifying 8 specific issues - backward compat fallbacks, data duplication, crowd_archetypes rendering bugs when array vs string. (2) 3-call architecture with PEOPLE and WORLD prompts. (3) Pre-composed variants for crowds. (4) New domains: landscape, transport, cultural_markers. (5) ANCHOR instruction for downstream steps. (6) Remove all backward compat fallbacks per user policy. (7) Exact code changes for each function with line numbers.
